inline_comments.message: Both DB initialization and db_data are almost same between DL-Feeder and DES (see same table create and data load in few instances). Can you clarify whats the need to have this included redundant among these 2 services?

If these 2 have different schema ('bit' in DES and 'boolean' in DL-feeder) might cause some confusions/errors as they use the same table and DB so I thought I keep them the same and DES does use the table 'db_type' in the code but not sure if there is any API that is using it.

If you ask why the other tables and data are redundant I'm not sure maybe @Kai can clarify. I did think of removing the unused tables but it wouldn't come within the scope of non-root access so I let them be.

yes, agreed. Was checking to see if the initdb/data load sql can be consolidated between these services; that is certainly outside scope of this non-root change. Will create separate jira to track it.
